title: LBS Bedwars
description: LBS BedWars is a unique resource pack created for the BedWars mini-game. It offers a variety of textures and a unique system that has not yet been presented in other similar resource packs for BedWars.
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/502a941987a2573166538e162ec053af6773c1a5.png)

**LBS BedWars** is a resource pack for Minecraft, created specifically for BedWars. Minimalistic textures, rich colors of wool and ceramics, and reduced tools. The unique system replaces the checkbox symbols with better-looking circles, and the cross symbols with their pixelated versions adapted for the game. It supports font changes without affecting key symbols.

> ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d39a399fb16751981f3bfbbe262d943270c37df0.png)

The resource pack changes almost all the tools, making them smaller versions. Wool and ceramics are colored in more saturated colors, and almost all blocks are designed in a minimalist style.

Thanks to our unique system, on most *Russian* BedWars servers, the flag (⚑) and cross (✗) symbols will be replaced with our unique textures.

 The checkmark texture will be a circle colored in the team's colors, while the cross will be a more sophisticated and appropriate pixelated version.

Also, if you're a fan of resource packs with different fonts, this resource pack will change almost all the unicode characters, except for the checkmark (⚑) and cross (✗), and all the letters!

Recently, an update was released that changed the sounds for PvP and made the items in the hand smaller.

> **Important! The checkmark and cross system does not work on versions older than 1.13!**
